question:
In two alloys, the ratio of Aluminium to Zinc are 5 : 6 and 3 : 5. If 242 kg of the first
alloy and 144 kg of the second alloy are mixed, then the ratio of Aluminium and
Zinc in the new alloy will be:
दॉ मभश्र धातुऑ ंभें, एल्युमभमनमभ ऒय म िंक का अनुऩात 5: 6 ऒय 3 : 5 वै। मदद ऩवरी मभश्रधातु के
242 kg ऒय दऴू यी मभश्रधातु के 144 kg कॉ आऩऴ भें मभरामा ाए, तॉ नई मभश्रधातु भें
एल्युमभमनमभ ऒय म िंक का अनुऩात क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A 40-litre mixture contains 25% alcohol and 75% water. If 10 litres of water are
added to the mixture, the percentage of alcohol in the new mixture is:
एक 40 रीटय मभश्रण भें 25% अल्कॉवर ऒय 75% ऩानी वै। मदद मभश्रण भें 10 रीटय ऩानी मभरामा
ाता वै, तॉ नए मभश्रण भें अल्कॉवर का प्रततलत क्या वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
3 liters of pure petrol is added to 13 liters of a mixture of petrol and ethanol
containing 40% petrol. Find the percentage of ethanol in the resulting mixture.
40% ऩेट्रॉर ऱारे ऩेट्रॉर ऒय इथेनॉर के 13 रीटय मभश्रण भें 3 रीटय लुद्ध ऩेट्रॉर मभरामा ाता वै।
ऩरयणाभी मभश्रण भें इथेनॉर का प्रततलत ज्ञात कीम ए।
RRB NTPC 19/03/2021 (Morning)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A 10-liter sugar solution containing 76% water is placed in the sun for 5 days.
After 5 days, if the water content in the solution remains 20%, what is the volume
of the remaining solution?
76% र मभमश्रत 10 रीटय चीनी के एक वऱरमन कॉ 5 ददनों के मरए धूऩ भें यखा ाता वै। 5 ददनों
फाद, मदद वऱरमन भ ें र की भात्रा 20% यवती वै तॉ लेळ वऱरमन का ऩरयभाण ज्ञात कय?ें
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Three bottles of the same capacity are 30%, 40% and 25% full of orange juice,
respectively. They are filled up completely by adding apple juice. The contents of
the three bottles are emptied into another vessel. What is the percentage of
apple juice in the mixture?
ऴभान धारयता की तीन फॉतरें क्रभलः 30%, 40% ऒय 25% ऴंतय े के ूऴ ऴे बयी रृई वै। ऴेफ का ूऴ
मभराकय फॉतरों कॉ ऩूयी तयव बय ददमा गमा। तीनों फॉतरों की ऴाभग्रिमों कॉ एक अन्य ऩात्र भें उडेर
ददमा गमा। इऴ मभश्रण भें ऴेफ के ूऴ का प्रततलत ज्ञात कय।ें
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
15 liters of a solution containing 40% acid and 60% water is mixed with 25 liters of
a solution containing 60% acid and 40% water. Find the percentage of water in
the resulting mixture.
15 रीटय घॉर म ऴभें 40% एमऴड ऒय 60% ऩानी वै उऴभें 25 रीटय ऐऴा घॉर मभरामा ाता वै
म ऴभें 60% एमऴड ऒय 40% ऩानी वै। ऩरयणाभी मभश्रण भें ऩानी का प्रततलत ज्ञात कय।ें
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
Pomegranate juice contains 10% sugar solution and orange juice contains 30%
sugar solution. What is the percentage of sugar solution in a mixture of two litres
of pomegranate juice and three litres of orange juice?
अनाय के यऴ भें 10% चीनी का घॉर वॉता वै ऒय ऴंतय े के यऴ भें 30% चीनी का घॉर वॉता वै। दॉ रीटय
अनाय के यऴ ऒय तीन रीटय ऴंतय े के यऴ के मभश्रण भें चीनी के घॉर का प्रततलत वकतना वै?
(SSC CHSL 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A container holds 63 liters of a mixture of apple juice and water. The ratio of
apple juice to water is 3 : 4. If 14 liters of the mixture are removed and 6 liters of
water are added, what will be the approximate percentage of apple juice in the
final mixture?
एक ऩात्र भें 63 रीटय ऴेफ यऴ ऒय ऩानी का मभश्रण वै। ऴेफ यऴ ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात 3 : 4 वै। मदद
इऴभें ऴे 14 रीटय मभश्रण मनकार मरमा ाम े ऒय 6 रीटय ऩानी मभरा ददमा ामे, तॉ अंततभ मभश्रण
भें ऴेफ यऴ रगबग वकतने प्रततलत वॉगा?
[UPSI, 15 Dec., 2017 Batch 2]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A vessel contains a 32litre solution of acid and water in which the ratio of acid
and water is 5:3. If 12litres of the solution are taken out and 7 litres of water are
added to it, then what is the ratio of acid and water in the resulting solution?
एक फततन भें अम्ल ऒय र का 32 रीटय घॉर वै, म ऴभें अम्ल ऒय र का अनुऩात 5: 3 वै। फ
फततन भें ऴे 12 रीटय घॉर मनकार मरमा ाता वै ऒय फततन भें 7 रीटय र मभरा ददमा ाता वै, तॉ
प्राप्त घॉर भें अम्ल ऒय र का अनुऩात क्या वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A beaker contains acid and water in the ratio 1 : x. When 300 ml of the mixture
and 50 ml of water are mixed, the ratio of acid and water becomes 2:5. What is
the value of x?
एक फीकय भें एमऴड ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात 1: x वै। फ 300 मभरी मभश्रण 50 मभरी ऩानी कॉ
मभरामा ाता वै तॉ एमऴड ऒय ऩानी के मभश्रण का अनुऩात 2 : 5 वॉ ाता वै। x का भान क्या वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Three boxes of capacity 208 kg, 312 kg and 832 kg are completely filled with
three varieties of wheat A1, B1 and C1 respectively. All the three boxes were
emptied and the three types of wheat were thoroughly mixed and the mixture
was put back in the boxes. How many kg of type A1 wheat would be there in
the third box?
208 वकरॉिाभ, 312 वकरॉिाभ ऒय 832 वकरॉिाभ क्षभता ऱारे तीन फक्से क्रभलः गेरॄं की तीन
वकस्मों A1, B1 ऒय C1 ऴे ऩूयी तयव बय े रृए वैं। तीनों फक्सों कॉ खारी कय ददमा गमा ऒय तीनों प्रकाय
के गेरॄं कॉ अच्छी तयव मभरामा गमा ऒय मभश्रण कॉ ऱाऩऴ फक्सों भें डार ददमा गमा। तीऴय े रडब्बे भें
वकतने वकरॉ A1 प्रकाय का गेरॄं वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
The concentration of three acids, P, Q and R, is given as 15%, 25% and 35%,
respectively. They are mixed in the ratio of x : 3: 5, resulting in a 28%
concentration solution. What is the value of x?
तीन अम्लों, P, Q ऒय R की ऴांद्रता क्रभलः 15%, 25% ऒय 35% दी गई वै। उन्हें x : 3: 5 के अनुऩात भें
मभरामा ाता वै, म ऴके ऩरयणाभस्वरूऩ 28% ऴाद्रं ता ऱारा घॉर फनता वै। x का भूल्य क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two containers of equal capacity are full of mixture of milk and water. In the first, the
ratio of milk to water is 3 : 7 and in the second it is 7 : 9. Now both the mixtures are
mixed in a bigger container. What is the resulting ratio of milk to water?
ऴभान क्षभता के दॉ कं टेनय दधू ऒय ऩानी के मभश्रण ऴे बय े रृए वैं। ऩवरे भें दधू ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात
3:7 वै ऒय दऴू य े भें 7:9 वै. अफ दॉनों मभश्रण कॉ एक फडे कं टेनय भें मभरा ददमा ाता वै. दधू ऒय ऩानी
का ऩरयणाभी अनुऩात क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two solutions contain rum and soda in the ratio 2 : 3 and 3 : 2, respectively. These
solutions are mixed in the ratio 1 : 4. Find the ratio of rum and soda in the
resulting solution.
दॉ घॉरों भें यभ ऒय ऴॉडा का अनुऩात क्रभलः 2 : 3 ऒय 3 : 2 वैं। इन घॉरों कॉ 1 : 4 के अनुऩात भें
मभमश्रत वकमा गमा वै। ऩरयणाभी घॉर भें यभ ऒय ऴॉडा के अनुऩात का ऩता रगाएं।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
Two water-squash mixtures, the first having a water-to-squash ratio of 4 : 1 and
the other having a ratio of 3 : 1, are blended in the ratio 1 : 2. What is the water:
squash ratio in the blend ?
ऩानी ऒय लयफत के दॉ अरग अरग मभश्रण म नभ ें ऩानी ऒय लयफत का अनऩु ात क्रभलः 4 : 1 ऒय 3 : 1 वै,
उनकॉ 1 : 2 के अनुऩात भ ें मभमश्रत वकमा ाता वै। अंततभ मभश्रण भ ें ऩानी ऒय लयफत का अनुऩात क्या वै?
RRB ALP 20/08/2018 (Evening)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
The ratios of copper to zinc in alloys A and B are 3 : 4 and 5 : 9, respectively. A and
B are taken in the ratio 2 : 3 and melted to form a new alloy C. What is the ratio of
copper to zinc in C?
मभश्र धातु A ऒय B भें तांफे ऒय स्ता के अनुऩात क्रभलः 3: 4 ऒय 5: 9 वैं। A ऒय B कॉ 2: 3 के
अनुऩात भें मरमा ाता वै ऒय एक नए मभश्रधातु C कॉ फनाने के मरए वऩघरामा ाता वै। C भें तांफे
ऒय स्ता का अनुऩात क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
P and Q are two alloys of aluminium and copper. The ratios of aluminium and
copper in P and Q are 5 : 11 and 3 : 5, respectively. If a third alloy is formed by
mixing alloys P and Q in the ratio of 1 : 3, then aluminium is what percentage
(rounded off to the nearest integer) of the copper in the third alloy ?
P ऒय Q एल्युमभमनमभ ऒय काऩय की दॉ मभश्रधातु वैं। P ऒय Q भें एल्युमभमनमभ ऒय कॉऩय का
अनुऩात क्रभलः 5 : 11 ऒय 3 : 5 वै। मदद मभश्र धातु P ऒय Q कॉ 1:3 के अनुऩात भें मभराकय एक
तीऴयी मभश्र धातु फनाई ाती वै, तॉ एल्युमभमनमभ तीऴयी मभश्र धातु भें कॉऩय का वकतना प्रततलत
(मनकटतभ ऩूणाकां तक ऩूणाांवकत) वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
Three glasses of 3 liters, 4 liters, and 5 liters each contain a mixture of yogurt
and water in the ratio 2 : 3, 3 : 7, and 4 : 11, respectively. If the mixture from the
three glasses is poured into a vessel, find the ratio of yogurt to water in the
resulting mixture.
3 रीटय, 4 रीटय ऒय 5 रीटय आकाय के तीन ग्रगराऴ भें दवी ऒय ऩानी का मभश्रण क्रभलः 2:3.3:7
ऒय 4: 11 अनुऩात भें वै। मदद तीनों ग्रगराऴों के मभश्रण कॉ एक फततन भें डार ददमा ाता वै तॉ
ऩरयणाभी मभश्रण भें ऩानी की तुरना भें दवी का अनुऩात फताइमे।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
The capacities of three containers P, Q and R are in the proportion of 5 : 4 : 8. They
are completely filled with a mixture of milk and water in the proportions of 1 : 4, 2
: 3 and 3 : 5, respectively. If the mixtures of all the three containers are mixed
together, then what will be the proportion of milk to water in the final mixture?
P, Q ऒय R तीन कं टेनयों की क्षभताऑ ं का अनुऩात 5:4:8 वै। ऱे क्रभलः 1:4,2:3 ऒय 3:5 अनुऩात
ऱारे दधू ऒय ऩानी के मभश्रण ऴे ऩूणततः बय े रृए वैं। मदद तीनों कं टेनय के मभश्रणों कॉ एक ऴाथ मभमश्रत
वकमा ाता वै, तॉ अंततभ मभश्रण भें दधू ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात ज्ञात कय।ें
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A 558 litre of mixture contains milk and water in the ratio 15:16. How much milk must be
added to the mixture so that it contains milk and water in the proportion of 3 : 2 ?
558 रीटय मभश्रण भें दधू ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात 15 : 16 वै। मभश्रण भें वकतना दधू मभरामा ाना
चारवए तावक दधू ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात 3 : 2 वॉ ाए?
[UP S.I. 23/11/2021 (Afternoon)]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
In a mixture of 50 litres, the ratio of alcohol and soda is 3 : 2. How much soda
should be added to make the ratio 6 : 7?
50 रीटय के एक मभश्रण भें, लयाफ ऒय ऴॉडा का अनुऩात 3 : 2 वै। 6 : 7 का अनुऩात फनाने के मरए
वकतना ऴॉडा मभरामा ाना चारवए?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A vessel contains milk and water in the ratio 12 : 11. If 28 liters of water is added to
this mixture, the ratio of milk and water becomes 2 : 3. Find the amount of water
in the new mixture.
एक फततन भें दधू ऒय ऩानी 12 : 11 के अनुऩात भें भॊ ूद वैं। मदद इऴ मभश्रण भें 28 रीटय ऩानी मभरामा
ाता वै, तॉ दधू ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात 2 : 3 वॉ ाता वै। नए मभश्रण भें ऩानी की भात्रा का ऩता रगाए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
Two vessels contains 47 litres and 59 litres quantity of solution contains milk
and water in the ratio of 23 : 24 and 34 : 25 respectively. Now the solutions are
mixed with each other, then how many litres of water to be added in the final
solution to make the resulting solution in the ratio 1 : 1?
दॉ ऩात्रों भें क्रभलः 47 रीटय ऒय 59 रीटय भात्रा भें दधू ऒय ऩानी का घॉर वै, म ऴभें दधू ऒय ऩानी
का अनुऩात क्रभलः 23 : 24 ऒय 34 : 25 वै। अफ इन घॉरों कॉ आऩऴ भें मभरा ददमा ाता वै, तॉ
अंततभ घॉर भें वकतना ऩानी मभराने ऩय दधू ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात 1 : 1 वॉ ाएगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
The ratio of acid and water in solution A is 5:4 and 7:11 in solution B. 10 liters of A is
mixed with 8 liters of B. In 324 ml of the resulting solution, how much water (in
ml) should be added to get a solution containing 33 acid?
घॉर A भें अम्ल ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात 5:4 ऒय घॉर B भें 7:11 वै। 10 रीटय A कॉ 8 रीटय B भें
मभरामा ाता वै। ऩरयणाभी घॉर के 324 मभरी भें 33 एमऴड मुक्त घॉर प्राप्त कयने के मरए वकतना
ऩानी (मभरी भें) मभरामा ाना चारवए?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
The ratio of acid and water in solutions A and B are 2 : 5 and 3 : 11, respectively.
Five litres of A is mixed with 4 litres of B and then one litre acid is also added to it.
What is the percentage of acid in the resulting solution ? (Nearest to an integer):
घॉर A ऒय घॉर B भें अम्ल ऒय र के अनुऩात क्रभलः 2:5 ऒय 3:11 वै। ऩााँच रीटय घॉर A कॉ 4
रीटय घॉर B के ऴाथ मभरामा ाता वै ऒय वपय इऴभें एक रीटय अम्ल बी डार ददमा ाता वै। इऴ
प्रकाय प्राप्त ऩरयणाभी घॉर भें अम्ल की प्रततलतता क्या वै? (एक ऩूणाकां के मनकटतभ)
[RPF CONSTABLE 2025]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A container holds a mixture of spirit and water in the ratio 4:3. If 5 liters of spirit
and 5 liters of water are added to this mixture, the ratio of spirit to water
becomes 5:4. Find the initial quantity of water in the container.
एक फततन भें स्पिरयट ऒय ऩानी 4:3 के अनुऩात भें भॊ ूद वैं। अगय इऴ मभश्रण भें 5 रीटय स्पिरयट 5
रीटय ऩानी मभरा ददमा ाता वै, तॉ स्पिरयट ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात 5:4 वॉ ाता वै। फततन भ ें ऩानी की
प्रायम्भिक भात्रा ज्ञात कय।ें
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A vessel contained a certain amount of solution of acid and water. When 2 liters
of water was added to it, the new solution had 50% acid concentration. When 15
liters of acid was further added to this new solution, the final solution had 80%
acid concentration. The ratio of water and acid in the original solution was?
एक फततन भें अम्ल ऒय ऩानी का एक मनमित भात्रा भें घॉर था। फ इऴभें 2 रीटय ऩानी मभरामा
गमा, तॉ नए घॉर भें 50% एमऴड ऴांद्रता थी। फ इऴ नए घॉर भें 15 रीटय एमऴड ऒय मभरामा गमा,
तॉ अंततभ घॉर भें 80% एमऴड ऴांद्रता थी। भूर घॉर भें ऩानी ऒय अम्ल का अनुऩात था ?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
In an x L solution of alcohol and water, the ratio of alcohol and water is 5:7. If 5 L of
alcohol and 11 L of water are added to the solution, the percentage of alcohol in
the resulting solution becomes 40%. What will be the value of x?
अरकॉवर ऒय ऩानी के x L वऱरमन भें, एरकॉवर ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात 5:7 वै। मदद वऱरमन भ ें 5
L एरकॉवर ऒय 11 L ऩानी ऒय मभरा ददमा ामे, तॉ ऩरयणाभी वऱरमन भें अरकॉवर का प्रततलत
40 % वॉ ाता वै। x का भान वकतना वॉगा?
(ICAR Technician 2022)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
From a container of 50 litres pure milk, 10 litres milk is taken out and replaced by
10 litres of water. If this process is repeated thrice, what is the ratio of water to
milk finally?
50 रीटय लुद्ध दधू ऱारे एक कं टेनय ऴे 10 रीटय दधू मनकारकय 10 रीटय ऩानी डारा ाता वै। मदद
इऴ प्रवक्रमा कॉ तीन फाय दॉवयामा ाता वै, तॉ अंततः ऩानी ऒय दधू के फीच क्या अनुऩात वै ?
RRB JE 27/05/2019 (Evening)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
From a container having pure milk, 40% is replaced by water and the process is
repeated thrice. At the end of the third operation, the purity of milk is:
लुद्ध दधू ऱारे एक कं टेनय ऴे, 40% कॉ ऩानी ऴे फदर ददमा ाता वै ऒय इऴ प्रवक्रमा कॉ तीन फाय
दॉवयामा ाता वै। तीऴयी फाय के अंत भें दधू की लुद्धता क्या वॉगी?
[SSC Selection Post (Phase-XII)]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A bottle contains 40 liters of pure alcohol. 25% of the alcohol is removed and
replaced with an equal amount of water. This process is repeated once more.
Approximately what percentage of alcohol is present in the final mixture?
एक फॉतर भें 40 रीटय लुद्ध लयाफ वै, म ऴभें ऴे 25% मनकार री ाती वै ऒय वपय उऴ े ऩानी की
उतनी वी भात्रा के ऴाथ फदर ददमा ाता वै। इऴ प्रवक्रमा कॉ एक फाय वपय ऴे दॉवयामा ाता वै। अन्तिभ
मभश्रण भें लयाफ का रगबग वकतना प्रततलत भॊ ूद वै?
[UPSI, 16 Dec., 2017 Batch 1]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A vessel contains 50 liters of milk. 5 liters of milk is taken out and water is added. This
process is repeated two more times. How much milk is there in the vessel now?
एक फततन भें 50 रीटय दधू वै। इऴभें ऴ े 5 रीटय दधू मनकार मरमा गमा ऒय उऴकी ऩानी डार ददमा
गमा। इऴ प्रवक्रमा कॉ ऒय दॉ फाय दॉवयामा गमा। फततन भें अफ वकतना दधू वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
From a 64-liter tin of diesel, 8 liters were taken out and the same amount of
water was added. If this process is repeated three times, what is the total
amount of diesel left in the tin at the end?
64 रीटय ऱारे डी र के एक रटन ऴ,े 8 रीटय फावय मनकारा गमा ऒय उऴभें उतना वी ऩानी मभरामा
गमा। मदद इऴी प्रवक्रमा कॉ तीन फाय दॉवयामा ाता वै, तॉ अंत भें रटन भें डी र की कु र वकतनी भात्रा
यव ाएगी?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
5 litres are drawn from a cask full of wine and is then filled with water. This operation is
performed once more. The ratio of the quantity of wine now left in cask to that of the
water is 16 : 9. How much wine the cask hold originally? (In litres)
लयाफ ऴे बये एक ऩीऩ े ऴ े 5 रीटय लयाफ मनकारी ाती वै ऒय वपय उऴ े ऩानी ऴे बय ददमा ाता वै। मव
प्रवक्रमा एक फाय वपय दॉवयाई ाती वै। ऩीऩे भें फची लयाफ की भात्रा ऒय ऩानी की भात्रा का अनुऩात
16:9 वै। ऩीऩ े भ ें भूर रूऩ ऴ े वकतनी लयाफ थी? (रीटय भें)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
From a container of wine, a thief has stolen 15 lit of wine and replaced it with
same quantity of water. He again, repeated the same process. Thus in 3
attempts ratio of wine and water becomes 343 : 169. Initial amount of wine.
ऱाइन के एक फततन भें ऴे एक चॉय 15 रीटय ऱाइन चुयाता वै ऒय उऴकी गव ऴभान भात्रा भें ऩानी
मभरा देता वै ऒय ऱव इऴ प्रवक्रमा कॉ दॉवयाता वै तथा ऐऴा तीन फाय कयने ऩय ऱाइन ऒय ऩानी का
अनुऩात 343 : 169 वॉ ाता वै तॉ लुरूआत भें ऱाइन की भात्रा क्या थी\
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A solution contains acid and water in the ratio of 4: 5 If 20% of the solution is replaced by
water, then what will be the ratio of acid and water in the new solution?
वकऴी वऱरमन भें अम्ल ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात 4 : 5 वै। मदद 20% वऱरमन, ऩानी द्वाया प्रततस्थावऩत
कय ददमा ाए, तॉ नए वऱरमन भें अम्ल ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात वकतना वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A container holds 80 liters of a water and milk mixture, with water making up
25% of the mixture. If the milkman removes 8 liters of this mixture and adds 8
liters of pure water, what is the percentage of water in the final mixture?
एक फततन म ऴभें 80 रीटय ऩानी ऒय दधू का मभश्रण वै, उऴभें ऩानी की भात्रा 25% वै। मदद दधू ऱारा
इऴ मभश्रण भें ऴ े 8 रीटय मनकार देता वै ऒय इऴभ ें 8 रीटय लुद्ध ऩानी डार देता वै, तॉ अंततभ मभश्रण
भें ऩानी का प्रततलत वकतना वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
The ratio of milk to water in a 100 litres mixture is 2: 3. 10 litres of this mixture is
withdrawn and replaced with milk. This process is repeated 2 more time. Wht is
the percentage of mild in final mixture?
100 रीटय के मरए मभश्रण भें दधू ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात 2:3 वै। इऴ मभश्रण भें ऴे 10 रीटय मनकार
मरमा ाता वै। तथा उतना वी दधू डार ददमा ाता वै। मव प्रवकमा 2 फाय ऒय दॉवयाई ाती वै। अंततभ
मभश्रण भें दधु का प्रततलत क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A mixture of apple juice and water is prepared. 10% of the mixture is removed and the
same amount of water is added. If the ratio of apple juice to water in the resulting
mixture is 2:3, find the ratio of apple juice to water in the original mixture.
ऴेफ के यऴ ऒय ऩानी का एक मभश्रण वै। उऴभ ें ऴे 10% मभश्रण मनकार कय उऴभ ें ऩानी की उतनी वी
भात्रा मभरा दी ाती वै। अगय ऩरयणाभी मभश्रण भें, ऴेफ के यऴ ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात 2:3 वै, तॉ अऴर
मभश्रण भें ऴेफ के यऴ ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात ज्ञात कय-ें
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
The ratio of milk and water in a mixture is 7:5. How much part of the mixture
should be replaced by water so hat ratio of milk and water is 2:3?
एक मभश्रण भें दधू ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात 7 % 5 वै। मभश्रण का वकतना बाग ऩानी ऴे प्रततस्थावऩत
वकमा ाए तावक मभश्रण भें दधू ऒय ऩानी का अनुऩात 2 % 3 यव ामे।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A solution contains vinegar and water in the ratio 5 : 3. How much of the solution
must be removed and replaced with water so that the solution contains equal
amounts of vinegar and water?
एक घॉर भें मऴयका ऒय ऩानी 5:3 के अनुऩात भें वैं। घॉर का वकतना रवस्सा मनकारकय उऴकी गव
ऩानी मभरा ददमा ाम े वक घॉर भें मऴयका ऒय ऩानी फयाफय भात्रा वॉ ामें?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A vessel contains a solution of two liquids A and B in the ratio 5:3. When 10 litres
of the solution is taken out and replaced by the same quantity of B, the ratio of A
and B in the vessel becomes 10:11. The quantity (in litres) of the solution, in the
vessel was ……….
एक फततन भें दॉ तयर ऩदाथों A ऒय B का वऱरमन वै म नका अनुऩात 5 : 3 वै। मदद फततन भें ऴे 10
रीटय वऱरमन मनकारा ाता वै ऒय उऴी भात्रा भें B कॉ मभरा ददमा ाता वै, तॉ फततन भें A ऒय B का
अनुऩात 10 : 11 वॉ ाता वै। फततन भें वऱरमन की भात्रा (रीटय भें) …………….. थी।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A bucket contains liquid A and B in the ratio 11 : 12. 92 litre of the mixture is taken
out and filled with 92 litre of B. Now the ratio changes to 9 :10. Find the quantity of
liquid B initially? (In litres)
एक फाल्टी भें द्रऱ A ऒय B 11:12 के अनुऩात भें वैं। मभश्रण भें ऴ े 92 रीटय मनकारकय उऴभ ें 92 रीटय
द्रऱ B मभरा ददमा ाता वै। अफ अनुऩात 9:10 वॉ ाता वै। लुरुआत भें द्रऱ B की भात्रा ज्ञात कीम ए?
(रीटय भें)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].
